title: Sick Leave Policy and Reporting Absences
text:
Q: What is the sick leave policy and how do I report an absence?
A: Our sick leave policy allows employees to take time off when they are ill or unable to perform their duties due to health reasons. Employees are entitled to 5 sick leave days per year, which can be taken as needed. To report an absence, please notify your direct supervisor as soon as possible, ideally at least one hour before your scheduled start time. You can do this via email or phone. If your absence extends beyond three consecutive days, a doctor's note may be required upon your return. For any questions or to discuss your sick leave balance, please contact the HR department at hr@company.com. Remember to keep your supervisor updated on your status if your absence lasts longer than expected.
